source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image_1> In the transition-state structure shown in the image, calculate the total number of bonds in the structure, including single, double, and triple bonds but excluding those involving hydrogen.

Note: Disregard arrows. Consider all components present in the transition-state structure shown in the image.
extraction_notes: image_1 is present as a PIL image placeholder string, not a path or URL

image_dependency: 题干明确写明“shown in the image”，并要求基于过渡态结构进行计数
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要在图像中
需要识别结构中的键型与组成部分，纯文本不足以完成作答
multi_step: 任务不只是直接读数，还要统计总键数，并区分 single/double/triple bond
题干包含排除条件：excluding those involving hydrogen、Disregard arrows
还要求“Consider all components present”，说明可能需要跨多个图中部分汇总，但整体仍属于中等复杂度计数
verifiability: answer_type 为 numeric，标准答案为单个数字，核验形式清晰
题目要求是可操作的结构计数，后续可通过人工或规则按图核对总键数
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，题目、答案和图像资产均已登记存在

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均已登记存在，核心语义支撑充分，不应 reject
该题强依赖图像理解，且标准答案为单个数字，整体可核验性较强
但当前图像分辨率较小（222x248），对过渡态结构中的键型与组成识别存在风险，影响稳定恢复，因此降为 low_priority

Note: Disregard arrows. Consider all components present in the transition-state structure shown in the image.
normalization_notes: Removed the image placeholder token from the question text.
Preserved the original bond-counting task and note without adding structural details.
Marked as image-dependent because the question explicitly refers to the depicted transition-state structure and force_requires_image is true.
